hypotheses.name: kNN Clustering Coefficient vs Feature-Shuffle Null
hypotheses.method: kNN graph (k=10, PCA-20) → clustering coefficient → empirical null (15 feature-shuffle replicates)
hypotheses.next_action: Consolidate as anchor result; test biological grounding (H02 TRRUST) to validate signal source

hypotheses.name: kNN Transitivity vs Feature-Shuffle Null
hypotheses.method: kNN graph (k=10, PCA-20) → transitivity → empirical null (15 feature-shuffle replicates)
hypotheses.next_action: Archive; transitivity in shuffled features is higher than real, suggests CC is main structural signal
